moved_logic_domains.to: ratio + visible-pixels focus mark for tall media cards

dependency_changes.change: pushOp now supports per-op flush delay
reaction ops flush at 35ms and prevent same-state re-send
setPostReaction ignores null reset and keeps previous state

detected_risks: Existing server snapshot still does not hydrate per-user myReaction for unseen sessions.
Queue entries created before this patch with state=null are now treated as no-op (intentional behavior change).
notes: Reaction button active state is visually dark + disabled.
Optimistic reaction counters are conservative when current state is unknown to avoid counter jumps.
View tracking now handles oversized post cards where intersectionRatio alone is insufficient.
